child.description: child(0) on element with no children throws IndexOutOfBoundsException (childNodeSize==0 branch)
child.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children

child.description: child(0) returns the only Element child (childNodeSize>0, one Element iteration)
child.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("span"));

child.description: child(2) returns third Element among multiple children (three Element iterations)
child.precondition: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));
child.expectedResult: returned Element is the third <li> instance
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("ul"); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li")); parent.appendChild(new Element("li"));

child.description: child(0) ignores non-Element nodes and returns first Element child (mixed children)
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("section"); parent.appendChild(new TextNode("x")); parent.appendChild(new Element("article"));

child.description: child(-1) negative index throws IndexOutOfBoundsException after adjustment
child.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("p"));
pseudocode: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendChild(new Element("p"));
